response: Hello! Welcome to Mini Hackathon 2026 Support. How can I assist your team today?
Mini Hackathon 2026 will be held on August 15th and 16th, 2026. Get ready for a 24-hour coding sprint!
You can register your team by clicking the 'Register Now' button on the navigation bar. Make sure to submit all details before the deadline!
A team must consist of 3 to 4 members. All members must be currently registered undergraduates.
The complete guidelines regarding eligibility, technology stacks, and evaluation criteria can be found under the 'Rules' section in our navigation bar.
The physical event will take place at the SLIIT Main Campus, Malabe. Specific lab locations will be emailed to shortlisted teams.
Exciting cash prizes, certificates, and exclusive swag await the Winners, 1st Runners-Up, and 2nd Runners-Up!
You can reach out to the MS Club of SLIIT organizing committee via email at info@msclubsliit.org or DM us on Instagram/Facebook.
